import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function HomePage() { const storedUser = localStorage.getItem("user"); const user = storedUser ? JSON.parse(storedUser) : null; return (

Welcome to Cloud Event Management Platform

This platform allows administrators to create and manage events, while users can explore events and register online.

{user ? (

Logged in as {user.name} ({user.role})

) : (

Please login or register to start using the platform.

)}

Main Features

Admin can create, update, and manage events.

Users can browse events and register for them.

The system uses cloud database integration and role-based access.

); } export default HomePage;
